product_overview: A backend-driven reception dashboard to manage room occupancy, guest check-ins/outs, transfers, billing actions, and guest experiences via authenticated endpoints and server-side validation.
core_goals: Provide a single dashboard to view room status and launch modals for guest actions
Support full check-in / check-out / transfer workflows with server-side validation
Enable room-level billing (add charge, pay charge) and integrate with the cashier/reservation services
Allow staff to schedule and launch guest experiences via a dedicated API
Enforce authentication and reception-role permission checks to secure operations
Surface clear error responses for invalid input or business-rule violations

features.name: Reception Rooms Management
features.description: View and manage room occupancy, perform check-in/check-out/transfer actions, add and pay charges, edit guest information, and launch guest experiences. All operations require authenticated users with reception permissions and return HTML (dashboard) or JSON for experience launches.
user_flows: GET /reception/rooms with valid session cookie and reception role -> Receive 200 HTML page with room status grid and modals
GET /reception/rooms without authentication or insufficient permissions -> Receive 302 redirect to /login or 403 (access denied)

POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'checkin', room_number, guest_name, doc_id, email, phone, checkin_date, checkout_date, num_adults} and valid auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /reception/rooms (successful check-in)
POST /reception/rooms with body {action: 'checkin'} but missing required fields (e.g., guest_name or checkin_date) -> Receive 400 Validation Error (Flash Message)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'checkout', room_number, reservation_id} and valid auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /reception/rooms (successful checkout)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'checkout', room_number} for a room that is not currently occupied -> Receive 400 Validation Error (Flash Message)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'transfer', room_number, reservation_id, target_room_number} and valid auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /reception/rooms (successful transfer)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'transfer', room_number, reservation_id, target_room_number} where target_room_number is already occupied -> Receive 400 Validation Error (Flash Message)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'edit_guest_name', room_number, reservation_id, guest_name} and valid auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /reception/rooms (guest name updated)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'edit_guest_name', room_number} with missing reservation_id or guest_name -> Receive 400 Validation Error (Flash Message)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'add_charge', room_number, reservation_id, charge_details} and valid auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /reception/rooms (charge added)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'add_charge', room_number, reservation_id} with invalid charge details (e.g., negative amount) -> Receive 400 Validation Error (Flash Message)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'pay_charge', room_number, reservation_id, payment_details} and valid auth -> Receive 302 Redirect to /reception/rooms (payment successful)
POST /reception/rooms with form body {action: 'pay_charge', room_number, reservation_id} with invalid payment details -> Receive 400 Validation Error (Flash Message)
POST /reception/experiences/launch with JSON body {room_number, guest_name, experience_id, collaborator_name, scheduled_date, notes} and valid auth -> Receive 200 JSON Success Response
POST /reception/experiences/launch with JSON body missing experience_id or with scheduled_date in the past -> Receive 400 JSON Error Response

features.name: Reception Rooms Management
features.description: Manage room occupancy, guest check-in/out, transfers, and billing.

endpoints.description: View dashboard with room status grid and modals.
Handle form submissions for check-in, check-out, transfer, etc.
Launch an experience for a guest.

known_limitations.issue: No strict input validation on frontend for some fields (relies on backend).
known_limitations.impact: Possible server errors on bad input.

known_limitations.issue: Check-in modal relies on JS global function which was fragile (fixed).
known_limitations.impact: User could not open check-in modal.
